duas.english: In Your Name, O Allah, I die and I live.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا، وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُور
duas.english: All Praise belongs to Allah, Who gave us life after He caused us to die, and unto Him is the resurrection [back to life].

duas.arabic: [بِسْمِ اللَّهِ ] اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
duas.english: [In the Name of Allah]. O Allah! I seek refuge in You from the male and female evil [unclean] spirits.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي كَسَانِي هَذَا الثَّوْبَ وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّة
duas.english: All Praise belongs to Allah, the One who dressed me in this garment and provided me with it without any might or power from me.

duas.topic: If one forgets to mention Allāh before eating
duas.english: In the Name of Allah, in the beginning and the end.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ، مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّة
duas.english: All Praise belongs to Allah, the One who has fed me this (food) and provided me with it, without any power or might from me.
May Allah reward you with good.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.english: In the Name of Allah I have placed my trust in Allah, and there is no Might or Power except from Allah.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
duas.english: In the Name of Allah [Give the greeting of Salam Upon Entering the Home]

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ
duas.english: In the Name of Allāh; All Praise belongs to Allāh. O How Perfect is He Who has subdued this (vehicle) to us, and we were not able to do it (on our own). Indeed, unto our Lord we are returning.

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ [ يَرْحَمُكَ اللَّهُ : ] يَهْدِيكُمُ اللَّهُ وَيُصْلِحُ بَالَكُمْ
duas.english: "All praise belong to Allah." ....and his brother or companion should say to him: "May Allah have mercy upon you." ...and he (i.e. the one who sneezed) should reply back to him: "May Allah guide you and rectify your condition."
I seek refuge in Allah from the Shaytan.
O Allah! Send a beneficial downpour.

duas.arabic: لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له ، له المُلْكُ وله الحمد، يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ حَيُّ لا يموت، بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ وَهوَ على كلّ شيءٍ قدير.
duas.english: There is none worthy of worship except Allah, alone without partners, to Him belong the kingdom and to Him belongs the praise, He gives life and causes death, in His Hand is all good, and He has power over all things.

duas.arabic: سُبْحانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلا أَنْتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ.
duas.english: You are free from imperfection, O Allāh, and to You belongs the praise, I bear witness that nothing has the right to be worshiped except You. I seek Your forgiveness and I turn to You in repentance.

title: C. Sickness & Ruqya
description: Authentic prayers for healing and visiting the sick.

title: D. Seeking Forgiveness & Pardon
description: Pleas for mercy and purification from sins.

title: E. Seeking Refuge & Protection
description: Prayers for protection from harm and evil.

title: F. Istikhāra - Seeking Allah's Guidance
description: The prayer for seeking guidance in decisions.

title: H. Supplications from the Qur'an
description: Powerful Du'as mentioned directly in the Qur'an.

title: I. Supplications of the Prophets
description: Du'as made by the Prophets of Allah.

title: J. Adhkar Before Sleeping
description: Remembrances to recite before going to bed.

title: K. Morning & Evening Adhkār
description: The daily protective morning and evening prayers.

title: M. Supplications in the Rukoo'
description: Adhkar to be recited while bowing in prayer.

title: N. Supplications in the Sajdah
description: Adhkar to be recited while prostrating.

title: O. Supplications between Sajdah & Tashahhud
description: Prayers during sitting and concluding Salah.

title: P. Simple Phrases of Dhikr
description: Short, highly rewarding phrases of remembrance.

title: Q. Ramadan Related Adhkār
description: Supplications specific to fasting and Ramadan.

title: R. The days of Dhul - Hijjah
description: Adhkar for the blessed days of Dhul-Hijjah.
